title: calamus johndransfieldii
intro: Calamus johndransfieldii is a species of the Acorus genus of plants, also known as a type of calamus, which is a type of rhizome that belongs to the family Acoraceae. Calamus johndransfieldii is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid digestion and relieve flatulence, due to its volatile oil content. The health benefits of calamus johndransfieldii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and acting as an antiseptic. Calamus johndransfieldii is commonly prepared as an essential oil, tincture, or dried rhizome, which can be used in teas, capsules, or topical applications.
